summary: Comprehensive testing of new production features (Iteration 13). All features verified working: version history & restore, keyword auto-linking, reading time, last updated timestamp, 404 page, error boundary, cancel behavior, tag filtering removed from home, Settings page user management, Tutorials last category.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - public access with hardcoded admin (admin@emergent.sh)
seed_data_creation: Created test documents for version history testing (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is stable with all new features working. 16 category cards on home page, Tutorials is last. Version history available via clock icon, restore button appears when viewing a version. Keywords like 'orchestrator', 'transformer', 'kubernetes' auto-link to their docs. Settings page has invite user with success toast, role change dropdown, delete user buttons. 404 page shows 'Page not found' with Go Home button. Cancel on new page just closes editor, doesn't redirect.

version_history.details: Clock icon opens version panel on right. If versions exist, clicking shows content. Restore button appears when viewing a version. Backend API POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/versions/{version_id}/restore works correctly - saves current as new version before restoring.

keyword_auto_linking.details: GET /api/keywords returns 50+ keyword-to-docId mappings. Keywords like 'orchestrator', 'transformer', 'kubernetes', 'docker', 'fastapi', 'mongodb', 'rag', 'subagent' all present. Links appear as dotted underline in paragraph/list text, clicking navigates to linked doc.

reading_time.details: Below doc title shows 'X min read' calculated from word count (200 words/min). Verified showing '5 min read', '4 min read' etc.

last_updated.details: Shows 'Updated Month Day, Year' format (e.g., 'Updated Feb 23, 2026') below document title.

404_page.details: Navigating to /nonexistent-page shows 'Page not found' with 'The page you're looking for doesn't exist.' and 'Go Home' button that navigates to home.

error_boundary.details: ErrorBoundary component wraps the app, would show 'Something went wrong' with Reload button on JS errors instead of white screen.

cancel_new_page.details: Clicking 'New page' then 'Cancel' closes the editor without redirecting. URL stays the same (doesn't navigate to /).

tag_filtering_removed.details: Home page shows 16 category cards without any tag cloud/filter section. Tags only appear on individual documents.

home_page_categories.details: 16 category cards displayed on home page with document counts. No internal/hidden categories shown.

tutorials_last.details: Tutorials category is the LAST in both sidebar and home page grid. Order verified: [..., UI Guide, FAQ, Tutorials]

settings_invite_user.details: Email input + role picker (Viewer/Admin) + Invite button. On success shows 'Invitation sent!' toast. On duplicate shows 'User already exists' error.

settings_change_role.details: Role dropdown (Viewer/Admin) for each user. Change triggers API PUT /api/users/{id}/role. Shows 'Role updated to X' success message.

settings_delete_user.details: Delete button (trash icon) for each user. Shows confirm dialog. On success shows 'User removed' message.

mocked_apis.authentication: MOCKED - hardcoded admin user (admin@emergent.sh), no real login flow
